site.name: Bhotey Kukur
site.description: Preserving the legacy of Nepal's royal guardian — champion bloodline Bhotey Kukur (Himalayan Mastiff) bred for excellence. Based in Lele, Lalitpur.

hero.title:
The Royal Guardian
of the Himalayas
hero.subtitle: Bhotey Kukur — Himalayan Mastiff
hero.description: For generations, the Himalayan Mastiff has stood as a symbol of strength, loyalty, and prestige. We are dedicated to preserving this majestic lineage through ethical breeding and unwavering standards.

lineage.title: A Lineage of Champions
lineage.subtitle: Our breeding program pairs champion-level bloodlines to produce puppies of exceptional quality — strong in temperament, magnificent in form, and true to the Himalayan Mastiff standard.

highlights.title: Champion Bloodlines
highlights.description: Every puppy traces back to proven champion lines with documented pedigrees spanning generations.

highlights.title: Health First
highlights.description: Comprehensive genetic screening, hip/elbow scoring, and full health guarantees on every puppy.

highlights.title: Ethical Rearing
highlights.description: Puppies are raised in a loving, family environment with early socialization and enrichment programs.

highlights.title: Show Quality
highlights.description: Our dogs have earned top honors at national and international breed shows across Asia.

tiers.title: Choose Your Companion
tiers.subtitle: We offer carefully structured tiers to match different needs — from loving family pets to champion show prospects.

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.description: A healthy, well-socialized companion with all essential care.

tiers.name: Medium
tiers.description: Enhanced lineage with superior conformation and temperament.

tiers.name: Best
tiers.description: Top-tier quality from our finest breeding pairings.

tiers.name: Top Tier
tiers.description: Exclusive champion prospects for serious enthusiasts and show homes.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Shrestha
testimonials.text: Our Himalayan Mastiff from Bhotey Kukur is absolutely majestic. The health and temperament are exceptional. The breeder's support even months after adoption has been incredible.

testimonials.name: Emily & David Chen
testimonials.text: We flew from the US to bring home our puppy. The entire process was seamless — from video calls to meet the puppies to the health documentation for international travel. Truly world-class.

testimonials.name: Anita Gurung
testimonials.text: I've owned dogs my whole life, but nothing compares to the intelligence and loyalty of my Bhotey Kukur mastiff. The breeding program here is clearly exceptional.

testimonials.name: Marcus Thapa
testimonials.text: The pedigree documentation and health screening gave us complete confidence. Our puppy arrived healthy, happy, and perfectly socialized. Highly recommend!

faq.q: What makes Himalayan Mastiffs different from Tibetan Mastiffs?
faq.a: While closely related, Himalayan Mastiffs (Bhotey Kukur) are a distinct landrace developed in the Nepalese Himalayas. They typically have a more athletic build, adapted to the specific terrain and climate of Nepal, with unique temperament characteristics prized by local breeders.

faq.q: How do I reserve a puppy?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp or email to discuss your needs. After a brief screening to ensure the best match, we'll guide you through our reservation process with a deposit.
Yes! We have experience arranging international adoptions with proper health certificates, travel documentation, and climate-controlled transport. We'll handle all the logistics.

faq.q: What health guarantees do you offer?
faq.a: Every puppy comes with a comprehensive health certificate, vaccination record, and a health guarantee. Higher tiers include genetic screening, hip/elbow scoring, and extended health monitoring.

videoGallery.title: Meet the Himalayan Mastiff
videoGallery.subtitle: Watch the majesty of Nepal's royal guardian breed — videos direct from our breeding program.

topDogs.title: Meet Our Champions
topDogs.subtitle: These are the dogs that define our breeding program — champions in form, temperament, and lineage.

dogs.name: Hammer
dogs.title: The Titan
dogs.description: Hammer is our finest champion — a massive Himalayan Mastiff with an unmatched presence. His lineage traces back to the finest bloodlines in Nepal, and his offspring consistently rank top in breed evaluations.
achievements: Best in Show — Himalayan Breed Expo

dogs.name: Shadow
dogs.title: The Guardian
dogs.description: Shadow embodies the protective nature of the Himalayan Mastiff. With a noble bearing and keen intelligence, he's the perfect representation of what makes this breed exceptional — loyal, powerful, and dignified.

dogs.name: Damaru
dogs.title: The Legend
dogs.description: Damaru is the patriarch of our kennel — a living legend whose bloodline runs through every puppy we produce. His calm confidence and majestic appearance make him the soul of Bhotey Kukur.

footer.description: Preserving the legacy of the Himalayan Mastiff — Nepal's royal guardian breed. Ethical, passionate, and committed to excellence since 1990.
